files_modified.changes_description: Added tsx arms to get_language_info and get_ts_language
Added tsx extension mapping and supported language entry

compile_belief_reason: All four insertions mirror the existing typescript arms exactly, using the correct LANGUAGE_TSX constant, typescript:: module prefix for queries/functions, and lang-tsx feature flag. No new pub mod declaration added. Pattern is identical to the typescript arm already compiling in the codebase.
